# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /data/lsl/SpGEMM/kokkos-kernels
# It was generated by CMake: /usr/local/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Optional override for the header directories that comprise TPL
// ACCELERATE. Default: None. Default common header locations will
// be searched
ACCELERATE_INCLUDE_DIRS:STRING=

//Optional override for the libraries that comprise TPL ACCELERATE.
// Default: None. Default common library names will be searched
ACCELERATE_LIBRARIES:STRING=

//Optional override for the library directories that comprise TPL
// ACCELERATE. Default: None. Default common library locations
// will be searched
ACCELERATE_LIBRARY_DIRS:STRING=

//Optional override for the header directories that comprise TPL
// ARMPL. Default: None. Default common header locations will be
// searched
ARMPL_INCLUDE_DIRS:STRING=

//Optional override for the libraries that comprise TPL ARMPL.
// Default: None. Default common library names will be searched
ARMPL_LIBRARIES:STRING=

//Optional override for the library directories that comprise TPL
// ARMPL. Default: None. Default common library locations will
// be searched
ARMPL_LIBRARY_DIRS:STRING=

//Optional override for the header directories that comprise TPL
// BLAS. Default: None. Default common header locations will be
// searched
BLAS_INCLUDE_DIRS:STRING=

//Optional override for the libraries that comprise TPL BLAS. Default:
// None. Default common library names will be searched
BLAS_LIBRARIES:STRING=

//Optional override for the library directories that comprise TPL
// BLAS. Default: None. Default common library locations will be
// searched
BLAS_LIBRARY_DIRS:STRING=

//Build shared libraries
BUILD_SHARED_LIBS:BOOL=OFF

//Build the testing tree.
BUILD_TESTING:BOOL=ON

//Optional override for the header directories that comprise TPL
// CBLAS. Default: None. Default common header locations will be
// searched
CBLAS_INCLUDE_DIRS:STRING=

//Optional override for the libraries that comprise TPL CBLAS.
// Default: None. Default common library names will be searched
CBLAS_LIBRARIES:STRING=

//Optional override for the library directories that comprise TPL
// CBLAS. Default: None. Default common library locations will
// be searched
CBLAS_LIBRARY_DIRS:STRING=

// CHOLMOD. Default: None. Default common header locations will
// be searched

//Optional override for the libraries that comprise TPL CHOLMOD.
// Default: None. Default common library names will be searched
CHOLMOD_LIBRARIES:STRING=

//Optional override for the library directories that comprise TPL
// CHOLMOD. Default: None. Default common library locations will
// be searched
CHOLMOD_LIBRARY_DIRS:STRING=

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/addr2line

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ar

//Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo
// MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=Release

//Enable/Disable color output during build.
CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE:BOOL=ON

//CXX compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/c++

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ar-10

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ranlib-10

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_DLLTOOL:FILEPATH=CMAKE_DLLTOOL-NOTFOUND

//Flags used by the linker during all build types.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Enable/Disable output of compile commands during generation.
CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS:BOOL=

//Value Computed by CMake.
CMAKE_FIND_PACKAGE_REDIRECTS_DIR:STATIC=/data/lsl/SpGEMM/kokkos-kernels/CMakeFiles/pkgRedirects

//User executables (bin)
CMAKE_INSTALL_BINDIR:PATH=bin

//Read-only architecture-independent data (DATAROOTDIR)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DATADIR:PATH=

//Read-only architecture-independent data root (share)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DATAROOTDIR:PATH=share

//Documentation root (DATAROOTDIR/doc/PROJECT_NAME)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DOCDIR:PATH=

//C header files (include)
CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR:PATH=include

//Info documentation (DATAROOTDIR/info)
CMAKE_INSTALL_INFODIR:PATH=

//Object code libraries (lib)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR:PATH=lib

//Program executables (libexec)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBEXECDIR:PATH=libexec

//Locale-dependent data (DATAROOTDIR/locale)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LOCALEDIR:PATH=

//Modifiable single-machine data (var)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LOCALSTATEDIR:PATH=var

//Man documentation (DATAROOTDIR/man)
CMAKE_INSTALL_MANDIR:PATH=

//C header files for non-gcc (/usr/include)
CMAKE_INSTALL_OLDINCLUDEDIR:PATH=/usr/include

//Install path prefix, prepended onto install directories.
CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:PATH=/data/lsl/SpGEMM/kokkos-kernels/build

//Run-time variable data (LOCALSTATEDIR/run)
CMAKE_INSTALL_RUNSTATEDIR:PATH=

//System admin executables (sbin)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SBINDIR:PATH=sbin

//Modifiable architecture-independent data (com)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SHAREDSTATEDIR:PATH=com

//Read-only single-machine data (etc)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SYSCONFDIR:PATH=etc

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_LINKER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ld

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/make

//If set, runtime paths are not added when using shared libraries.
CMAKE_SKIP_RPATH:BOOL=NO

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries

CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_STRIP:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/strip

//If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the
// .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console
// during the make.  This is useful for debugging only. With Visual
// Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE:BOOL=FALSE

COVERAGE_COMMAND:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcov

//Extra command line flags to pass to the coverage tool
COVERAGE_EXTRA_FLAGS:STRING=-l

CTEST_SUBMIT_RETRY_COUNT:STRING=3

//How long to wait between timed-out CTest submissions.
CTEST_SUBMIT_RETRY_DELAY:STRING=5

DART_TESTING_TIMEOUT:STRING=1500

//Path to a program.
GITCOMMAND:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/git

KOKKOSKERNELS_ALL_COMPONENTS_ENABLED:BOOL=ON

KOKKOSKERNELS_HAS_TRILINOS:BOOL=OFF

//Location of ACCELERATE install root. Default: None or the value
// of the environment variable ACCELERATE_ROOT if set
KokkosKernels_ACCELERATE_ROOT:PATH=

//Whether to include a set of default ETI instantiations (otherwise
// only those explicitly requested will be included
KokkosKernels_ADD_DEFAULT_ETI:BOOL=ON

//Location of ARMPL install root. Default: None or the value of
// the environment variable ARMPL_ROOT if set
KokkosKernels_ARMPL_ROOT:PATH=

//Value Computed by CMake
KokkosKernels_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/data/lsl/SpGEMM/kokkos-kernels

//Location of BLAS install root. Default: None or the value of
// the environment variable BLAS_ROOT if set
KokkosKernels_BLAS_ROOT:PATH=

//Location of CBLAS install root. Default: None or the value of
// the environment variable CBLAS_ROOT if set
KokkosKernels_CBLAS_ROOT:PATH=

//Location of CHOLMOD install root. Default: None or the value
// of the environment variable CHOLMOD_ROOT if set
KokkosKernels_CHOLMOD_ROOT:PATH=

//Location of CUBLAS install root. Default: None or the value of

KokkosKernels_CUBLAS_ROOT:PATH=

//Location of CUSOLVER install root. Default: None or the value
// of the environment variable CUSOLVER_ROOT if set

//Location of CUSPARSE install root. Default: None or the value
// of the environment variable CUSPARSE_ROOT if set
KokkosKernels_CUSPARSE_ROOT:PATH=

//A list of components to enable in testing and building
KokkosKernels_ENABLED_COMPONENTS:STRING=ALL

//Whether to build all the library's components. Default: ON
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_ALL_COMPONENTS:BOOL=ON

//Whether to build benchmarks. Default: OFF
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_BENCHMARKS:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to turn on more warnings. Default: OFF
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_COMPILER_WARNINGS:BOOL=OFF

KokkosKernels_ENABLE_COMPONENT_BATCHED:BOOL=ON

KokkosKernels_ENABLE_COMPONENT_BLAS:BOOL=ON

KokkosKernels_ENABLE_COMPONENT_GRAPH:BOOL=ON

KokkosKernels_ENABLE_COMPONENT_LAPACK:BOOL=ON

KokkosKernels_ENABLE_COMPONENT_ODE:BOOL=ON

KokkosKernels_ENABLE_COMPONENT_SPARSE:BOOL=ON

//Whether to build docs. Default: OFF
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_DOCS:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to build examples. Default: OFF
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_EXAMPLES:BOOL=OFF

//Enable building and installation of experimental KokkosKernels
// features. Default: OFF
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_EXPERIMENTAL:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to build performance tests. Default: OFF
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_PERFTESTS:BOOL=ON

//Whether to build supernodal SPTRSV support
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_SUPERNODAL_SPTRSV:BOOL=ON

//Whether to build tests. Default: OFF
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_TESTS_AND_PERFSUITE:UNINITIALIZED=ON

//Whether to enable ACCELERATE Default: OFF
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_TPL_ACCELERATE:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to enable ARMPL Default: OFF
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_TPL_ARMPL:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to enable BLAS Default: OFF
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_TPL_BLAS:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to enable CBLAS Default: OFF
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_TPL_CBLAS:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to enable CHOLMOD Default: OFF
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_TPL_CHOLMOD:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to enable CUBLAS Default: ON if CUDA-enabled Kokkos,
// otherwise OFF
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_TPL_CUBLAS:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to enable CUSOLVER Default: ON if CUDA-enabled Kokkos,
// otherwise OFF
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_TPL_CUSOLVER:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to enable CUSPARSE Default: ON if CUDA-enabled Kokkos,
// otherwise OFF
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_TPL_CUSPARSE:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to enable LAPACK Default: ON if BLAS is enabled, otherwise
// OFF
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_TPL_LAPACK:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to enable LAPACKE Default: OFF
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_TPL_LAPACKE:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to enable MAGMA Default: OFF
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_TPL_MAGMA:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to enable METIS Default: OFF
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_TPL_METIS:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to enable MKL Default: OFF
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_TPL_MKL:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to enable ROCBLAS Default: OFF even if HIP-enabled Kokkos
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_TPL_ROCBLAS:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to enable ROCSOLVER Default: OFF even if HIP-enabled
// Kokkos
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_TPL_ROCSOLVER:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to enable ROCSPARSE Default: OFF even if HIP-enabled
// Kokkos
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_TPL_ROCSPARSE:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to enable SUPERLU Default: OFF
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_TPL_SUPERLU:BOOL=OFF

//Whether warnings should be treated as errors. Default: OFF
KokkosKernels_ENABLE_WARNINGS_AS_ERRORS:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to restrict availability of kernels to ETI types only.
// Turning this on guarantees that kernels are never built inside
// of object files which simply call KokkosKernels functions. Default:
// OFF
KokkosKernels_ETI_ONLY:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to pre instantiate kernels for the scalar type Kokkos::Experimental::bhalf_t.
//  Disabling this may increase build times. Default: OFF
KokkosKernels_INST_BHALF:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to pre instantiate kernels for the scalar type complex<double>.
//  Disabling this may increase build times. Default: OFF or unless
// enabled during a Trilinos build with Trilinos_ENABLE_COMPLEX_DOUBLE.
KokkosKernels_INST_COMPLEX_DOUBLE:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to pre instantiate kernels for the scalar type complex<float>.
//  Disabling this may increase build times. Default: OFF or unless
// enabled during a Trilinos build with Trilinos_ENABLE_COMPLEX_FLOAT.
KokkosKernels_INST_COMPLEX_FLOAT:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to pre instantiate kernels for the scalar type double.
//  This option is KokkosKernels_INST_DOUBLE=ON by default.  Disabling
// this may increase build times. Default: ON
KokkosKernels_INST_DOUBLE:BOOL=On

//Whether to pre instantiate kernels for the execution space Kokkos::OpenMP.
//  Disabling this when Kokkos_ENABLE_OPENMP is enabled may increase
// build times. Default: ON if Kokkos is OpenMP-enabled, OFF otherwise.
KokkosKernels_INST_EXECSPACE_OPENMP:BOOL=ON

//Whether to build kernels for the execution space Kokkos::Serial.
//  If explicit template instantiation (ETI) is enabled in Trilinos,
// disabling this when Kokkos_ENABLE_SERIAL is enabled may increase
// build times. Default: ON when Kokkos is Serial-enabled, OFF
// otherwise.
KokkosKernels_INST_EXECSPACE_SERIAL:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to build kernels for the execution space Kokkos::Threads.
//  If explicit template instantiation (ETI) is enabled in Trilinos,
// disabling this when Kokkos_ENABLE_THREADS is enabled may increase
// build times. Default: ON if Kokkos is Threads-enabled, OFF otherwise.
KokkosKernels_INST_EXECSPACE_THREADS:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to pre instantiate kernels for the scalar type float.
//  Disabling this may increase build times. Default: OFF or unless
// enabled during a Trilinos build with Trilinos_ENABLE_FLOAT.
KokkosKernels_INST_FLOAT:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to pre instantiate kernels for the scalar type Kokkos::Experimental::half_t.
//  Disabling this may increase build times. Default: OFF
KokkosKernels_INST_HALF:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to pre instantiate kernels for the view layout LayoutLeft.
//  This option is KokkosKernels_INST_LAYOUTLEFT=ON by default.
//  Disabling this may increase build times. Default: ON
KokkosKernels_INST_LAYOUTLEFT:BOOL=ON

//Whether to pre instantiate kernels for the view layout LayoutRight.
//  This option is KokkosKernels_INST_LAYOUTRIGHT=OFF by default.
//  Disabling this may increase build times. Default: OFF
KokkosKernels_INST_LAYOUTRIGHT:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to pre instantiate kernels for the memory space Kokkos::HostSpace.
//  Disabling this when one of the Host execution spaces is enabled
// may increase build times. Default: ON
KokkosKernels_INST_MEMSPACE_HOSTSPACE:BOOL=ON

//Whether to pre instantiate kernels for the offset type int. 
// This option is KokkosKernels_INST_OFFSET_INT=OFF by default.
// Default: ON
KokkosKernels_INST_OFFSET_INT:BOOL=ON

//Whether to pre instantiate kernels for the offset type size_t.
//  This option is KokkosKernels_INST_OFFSET_SIZE_T=ON by default.
// Default: OFF
KokkosKernels_INST_OFFSET_SIZE_T:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to pre instantiate kernels for the ordinal type int.
//  This option is KokkosKernels_INST_ORDINAL_INT=ON by default.
// Default: ON
KokkosKernels_INST_ORDINAL_INT:BOOL=ON

//Whether to pre instantiate kernels for the ordinal type int64_t.
//  This option is KokkosKernels_INST_ORDINAL_INT64_T=OFF by default.
// Default: OFF
KokkosKernels_INST_ORDINAL_INT64_T:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
KokkosKernels_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=ON

//Location of LAPACKE install root. Default: None or the value
// of the environment variable LAPACKE_ROOT if set
KokkosKernels_LAPACKE_ROOT:PATH=

//Location of LAPACK install root. Default: None or the value of
// the environment variable LAPACK_ROOT if set
KokkosKernels_LAPACK_ROOT:PATH=

//DEPRECATED. Optimization level for KokkosKernels computational
// kernels: a nonnegative integer.  Higher levels result in better
// performance that is more uniform for corner cases, but increase
// build time and library size.  The default value is 1, which
// should give performance within ten percent of optimal on most
// platforms, for most problems. Default: 1
KokkosKernels_LINALG_OPT_LEVEL:BOOL=1

//Location of MAGMA install root. Default: None or the value of
// the environment variable MAGMA_ROOT if set
KokkosKernels_MAGMA_ROOT:PATH=

//Location of METIS install root. Default: None or the value of
// the environment variable METIS_ROOT if set
KokkosKernels_METIS_ROOT:PATH=

//Location of MKL install root. Default: None or the value of the
// environment variable MKL_ROOT if set
KokkosKernels_MKL_ROOT:PATH=

//Whether CUDA TPLs should be enabled by default. Default: OFF
KokkosKernels_NO_DEFAULT_CUDA_TPLS:BOOL=OFF

//Whether ROCM TPLs should be enabled by default. Default: OFF
KokkosKernels_NO_DEFAULT_ROCM_TPLS:BOOL=OFF

//Location of ROCBLAS install root. Default: None or the value
// of the environment variable ROCBLAS_ROOT if set
KokkosKernels_ROCBLAS_ROOT:PATH=

//Location of ROCSOLVER install root. Default: None or the value
// of the environment variable ROCSOLVER_ROOT if set
KokkosKernels_ROCSOLVER_ROOT:PATH=

//Location of ROCSPARSE install root. Default: None or the value
// of the environment variable ROCSPARSE_ROOT if set
KokkosKernels_ROCSPARSE_ROOT:PATH=

//Whether to run benchmarks. Default: OFF
KokkosKernels_RUN_BENCHMARKS:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
KokkosKernels_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/data/lsl/SpGEMM/kokkos-kernels

//Location of SUPERLU install root. Default: None or the value
// of the environment variable SUPERLU_ROOT if set
KokkosKernels_SUPERLU_ROOT:PATH=

//Whether to restrict testing to ETI types. Default: ON
KokkosKernels_TEST_ETI_ONLY:BOOL=ON

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for Kokkos.
Kokkos_DIR:PATH=/usr/local/lib/cmake/Kokkos

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
Kokkos_ROOT:UNINITIALIZED=/usr/local

// LAPACKE. Default: None. Default common header locations will
// be searched
LAPACKE_INCLUDE_DIRS:STRING=

//Optional override for the libraries that comprise TPL LAPACKE.
// Default: None. Default common library names will be searched

LAPACK_LIBRARY_DIRS:STRING=

// MAGMA. Default: None. Default common library locations will

//Command to build the project
MAKECOMMAND:STRING=/usr/local/bin/cmake --build . --config "${CTEST_CONFIGURATION_TYPE}"

//Path to the memory checking command, used for memory error detection.
MEMORYCHECK_COMMAND:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/valgrind

//File that contains suppressions for the memory checker
MEMORYCHECK_SUPPRESSIONS_FILE:FILEPATH=

//Optional override for the header directories that comprise TPL
// METIS. Default: None. Default common header locations will be
// searched
METIS_INCLUDE_DIRS:STRING=

//Optional override for the libraries that comprise TPL METIS.
// Default: None. Default common library names will be searched
METIS_LIBRARIES:STRING=

//Optional override for the library directories that comprise TPL
// METIS. Default: None. Default common library locations will
// be searched
METIS_LIBRARY_DIRS:STRING=

//Optional override for the header directories that comprise TPL
// MKL. Default: None. Default common header locations will be
// searched
MKL_INCLUDE_DIRS:STRING=

//Optional override for the libraries that comprise TPL MKL. Default:
// None. Default common library names will be searched
MKL_LIBRARIES:STRING=

//Optional override for the library directories that comprise TPL
// MKL. Default: None. Default common library locations will be
// searched
MKL_LIBRARY_DIRS:STRING=

//CXX compiler flags for OpenMP parallelization
OpenMP_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=-fopenmp

//CXX compiler libraries for OpenMP parallelization
OpenMP_CXX_LIB_NAMES:STRING=gomp;pthread

//Path to the gomp library for OpenMP
OpenMP_gomp_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/10/libgomp.so

//Path to the pthread library for OpenMP
OpenMP_pthread_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.so

//Optional override for the header directories that comprise TPL
// ROCBLAS. Default: None. Default common header locations will
// be searched
ROCBLAS_INCLUDE_DIRS:STRING=

//Optional override for the libraries that comprise TPL ROCBLAS.
// Default: None. Default common library names will be searched
ROCBLAS_LIBRARIES:STRING=

//Optional override for the library directories that comprise TPL
// ROCBLAS. Default: None. Default common library locations will
// be searched
ROCBLAS_LIBRARY_DIRS:STRING=

//Optional override for the header directories that comprise TPL
// ROCSOLVER. Default: None. Default common header locations will
// be searched
ROCSOLVER_INCLUDE_DIRS:STRING=

//Optional override for the libraries that comprise TPL ROCSOLVER.
// Default: None. Default common library names will be searched
ROCSOLVER_LIBRARIES:STRING=

//Optional override for the library directories that comprise TPL
// ROCSOLVER. Default: None. Default common library locations will
// be searched
ROCSOLVER_LIBRARY_DIRS:STRING=

//Optional override for the header directories that comprise TPL
// ROCSPARSE. Default: None. Default common header locations will
// be searched
ROCSPARSE_INCLUDE_DIRS:STRING=

//Optional override for the libraries that comprise TPL ROCSPARSE.
// Default: None. Default common library names will be searched
ROCSPARSE_LIBRARIES:STRING=

//Optional override for the library directories that comprise TPL
// ROCSPARSE. Default: None. Default common library locations will
// be searched
ROCSPARSE_LIBRARY_DIRS:STRING=

//Name of the computer/site where compile is being run
SITE:STRING=compute5

//Optional override for the header directories that comprise TPL
// SUPERLU. Default: None. Default common header locations will
// be searched
SUPERLU_INCLUDE_DIRS:STRING=

//Optional override for the libraries that comprise TPL SUPERLU.
// Default: None. Default common library names will be searched
SUPERLU_LIBRARIES:STRING=

//Optional override for the library directories that comprise TPL
// SUPERLU. Default: None. Default common library locations will
// be searched
SUPERLU_LIBRARY_DIRS:STRING=


########################
# INTERNAL cache entries
########################

//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_ADDR2LINE
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_AR
CMAKE_AR-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//This is the directory where this CMakeCache.txt was created
CMAKE_CACHEFILE_DIR:INTERNAL=/data/lsl/SpGEMM/kokkos-kernels
//Major version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_MAJOR_VERSION:INTERNAL=3
//Minor version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_MINOR_VERSION:INTERNAL=25
//Patch version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_PATCH_VERSION:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE
CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Path to CMake executable.
CMAKE_COMMAND:INTERNAL=/usr/local/bin/cmake
//Path to cpack program executable.
CMAKE_CPACK_COMMAND:INTERNAL=/usr/local/bin/cpack
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_CTEST_COMMAND
CMAKE_CTEST_COMMAND-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Path to ctest program executable.
CMAKE_CTEST_COMMAND:INTERNAL=/usr/local/bin/ctest
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR

CMAKE_DLLTOOL-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1

FIND_PACKAGE_MESSAGE_DETAILS_OpenMP:INTERNAL=[TRUE][cfound components: CXX ][v4.5()]
//Details about finding OpenMP_CXX
FIND_PACKAGE_MESSAGE_DETAILS_OpenMP_CXX:INTERNAL=[-fopenmp][/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/10/libgomp.so][/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.so][v4.5()]

GITCOMMAND-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1

KokkosKernels_INSTALL_TESTING:INTERNAL=OFF

MAKECOMMAND-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: MEMORYCHECK_COMMAND
MEMORYCHECK_COMMAND-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: MEMORYCHECK_SUPPRESSIONS_FILE
MEMORYCHECK_SUPPRESSIONS_FILE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1

OpenMP_COMPILE_RESULT_CXX_fopenmp:INTERNAL=TRUE
//ADVANCED property for variable: OpenMP_CXX_FLAGS
OpenMP_CXX_FLAGS-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: OpenMP_CXX_LIB_NAMES
OpenMP_CXX_LIB_NAMES-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//CXX compiler's OpenMP specification date
OpenMP_CXX_SPEC_DATE:INTERNAL=201511
//Result of TRY_COMPILE
OpenMP_SPECTEST_CXX_:INTERNAL=TRUE
//ADVANCED property for variable: OpenMP_gomp_LIBRARY
OpenMP_gomp_LIBRARY-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1

OpenMP_pthread_LIBRARY-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1

_CMAKE_LINKER_PUSHPOP_STATE_SUPPORTED:INTERNAL=TRUE

_GNUInstallDirs_LAST_CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:INTERNAL=/data/lsl/SpGEMM/kokkos-kernels/build
